name: Drug Safety Analysis Workflow
description: Comprehensive drug safety analysis pipeline that searches drug labels, checks interactions, reviews adverse event data, and generates a safety profile report. Integrates with DrugMind for drug development workflows.
author: MoKangMedical

nodes.name: Drug Information Lookup
nodes.description: Search FDA drug labels for the target drug

nodes.name: Safety Profile Analysis
nodes.description: Analyze all gathered data for safety profile
nodes.prompt:
You are a pharmacovigilance specialist. Analyze the following drug safety data:

**FDA Drug Label Data:**
{{drug_label_data}}

**Clinical Trial Data:**
{{trial_data}}

**Safety Literature:**
{{safety_literature}}

Generate a comprehensive drug safety profile including:
1. Drug Overview (name, class, mechanism)
2. Indications and Contraindications
3. Common Adverse Reactions (frequency)
4. Serious Adverse Events (black box warnings)
5. Drug-Drug Interactions
6. Special Populations (pregnancy, pediatrics, geriatrics, renal/hepatic)
7. Clinical Trial Safety Summary
8. Post-Market Surveillance Signals
9. Risk-Benefit Assessment
10. Recommendations

All claims must cite source (FDA label section, PMID, or NCT ID).
